bird.summary: The semipalmated plover (Charadrius semipalmatus) is a small plover. Charadrius is a Late Latin word for a yellowish bird mentioned in the…

locations.name: 古希腊语
locations.summary: 古希腊语（阿提卡方言: Ἑλληνικὴ γλῶττα，伊奧尼亞方言 / 多利亞方言：Ἑλληνικὴ γλῶσσα） 指公元前9世紀至公元前4世紀所有以口头及书面为载体的古希腊语族的方言，時間上包括公元前9世纪至公元前6世纪的古風时期，…

locations.name: 美国
locations.summary: 美利堅合眾國（英語：United States of America，縮寫：USA），简称美国、美利堅（英語：America）或合眾國（United States，縮寫：US），是位於北美洲的聯邦制共和國。其由50個州、首都华盛顿哥伦比亚…

locations.name: 加勒比地区
locations.summary: 加勒比地區（英語：Caribbean）是指加勒比海及其附近的區域。 定義 若依照聯合國地理分區裡的地理亞區來判定，加勒比地區的範圍為加勒比海上的諸島—西印度群島，國家與屬地包含安圭拉、安地卡及巴布達、阿魯巴、巴哈馬、巴貝多、博奈爾、聖佑達…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

locations.name: 火地群岛
locations.summary: 火地群岛（西班牙語：Archipiélago de Tierra del Fuego）是南美洲最南端的一个群岛，由主岛火地岛及周边小岛组成，总面积73,753平方公里。其主岛火地岛西半部以及其西、南部的全部岛屿均归属于智利境內麦哲伦-智利…

relations.subject: Semipalmated plover
relations.evidence: It derives from Ancient Greek kharadrios a bird found in ravines and river valleys (kharadra, "ravine")

relations.subject: Semipalmated plover
relations.evidence: They are migratory and winter in coastal areas of the southern United States, the Caribbean and much of South America

relations.subject: Semipalmated plover
relations.evidence: They are extremely rare vagrants to western Europe, and have been found in Tierra del Fuego and the Isles of Scilly. Their true status may be obscured by the difficulty in identifying them from the very similar ringed plover of Eurasia, of which it was formerly considered a subspecies

relations.subject: Semipalmated plover
relations.evidence: Their breeding habitat is open ground on beaches or flats across northern Canada and Alaska
